steps: قم بتسجيل الدخول إلى حسابك الجامعي
ستلاحظ أن الزر تغيّر إلى استيراد جدول
اضغط على الزر ليتم استيراد الجدول
importScript: const scheduleCode = {}  // A helper function to convert a time string like '08:00' to minutes from midnight  const timeToMinutes = (timeStr) => {    if (!timeStr) return 0;    const [hours, minutes] = timeStr.split(':').map(Number);    return hours * 60 + minutes;  };  // A map to convert Arabic day names to a numerical index (0 for Saturday, etc.)  const dayMap = {    السبت: 0,    الأحد: 1,    الإثنين: 2,    الثلاثاء: 3,    الإربعاء: 4,    الخميس: 5,  };  // Select the main schedule table from the page  const table = document.querySelector(    'table[cellspacing="0"][cellpadding="7"]'  );  if (!table) {    console.error(      'Schedule table not found. Make sure the HTML is loaded correctly.'    );    return;  }  const rows = table.querySelectorAll('tr');  // --- Step 1: Parse the time slots from the header row (08:00-09:30, etc.) ---  const timeHeaderCells = Array.from(rows[0].querySelectorAll('td')).slice(1);  const timeSlots = timeHeaderCells.map((cell) => {    const timeText = cell.textContent.trim();    const [start, end] = timeText.split(' - ');    return {      startTime: timeToMinutes(start),      endTime: timeToMinutes(end),    };  });  // --- Step 2: Iterate through each day's row to extract course data ---  // Start from the second row (index 1) to skip the header  for (let i = 1; i < rows.length; i++) {    const cells = rows[i].querySelectorAll('td');    const dayName = cells[0].textContent.trim();    const dayIndex = dayMap[dayName];    // Continue only if the row corresponds to a valid day    if (dayIndex === undefined) {      continue;    }    // --- Step 3: Iterate through each time slot cell for that day ---    for (let j = 1; j < cells.length; j++) {      const courseCell = cells[j];            courseLink = courseCell.querySelector('p[title]');        if (courseLink) {        // Extract all the details from the HTML elements        const courseName = courseLink.getAttribute('title').trim();        const courseCode = courseLink.textContent.trim();        const detailsDiv = courseCell.querySelector('div');        const doctor = detailsDiv.childNodes[0].textContent.trim();        const place = detailsDiv.querySelector("a[title='القاعة']").textContent.trim().replace(/[()]/g, "");        // Get the start and end time based on the column index of the cell        const { startTime, endTime } = timeSlots[j - 1];        console.log(courseCode, startTime, endTime);        // --- Step 4: Add the extracted details to our main schedule object ---        // If this is the first time we see this course, initialize it in our object        if (!scheduleCode[courseCode]) {          scheduleCode[courseCode] = {            courseName: courseName,            courseCode: courseCode,            timings: [],          };        }        // *** THE CORRECTED LOGIC ***        // This unconditionally creates and adds a new timing object for every class found.        // It does not try to merge or group days.        scheduleCode[courseCode].timings.push({          doctor: doctor,          place: place,          startTime: startTime,          endTime: endTime,          days: [dayIndex], // The 'days' array will always contain just the one day for this session.        });      }    }  }  const schedule = {};   // return JSON.stringify(scheduleCode);  for (const value of Object.values(scheduleCode)){    const lecture = value; // value is the object scheduleCode[key]    schedule[lecture.courseName] = lecture;  }  // --- Step 5: Return the final, correctly structured object ---  return JSON.stringify(schedule);

scripts.script: const params = new URLSearchParams(window.location.search); if('mytable' === params.get('page')) {window.isTargeted.postMessage('true');}
